title: Human Resources Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate human resources activities and staff of an organization.

tasks.text: Serve as a link between management and employees by handling questions, interpreting and administering contracts and helping resolve work-related problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, direct, supervise, and coordinate work activities of subordinates and staff relating to employment, compensation, labor relations, and employee relations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform difficult staffing duties, including dealing with understaffing, refereeing disputes, firing employees, and administering disciplinary procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Represent organization at personnel-related hearings and investigations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate bargaining agreements and help interpret labor contracts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise managers on organizational policy matters, such as equal employment opportunity and sexual harassment, and recommend needed changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct new employee orientation to foster positive attitude toward organizational objectives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze and modify compensation and benefits policies to establish competitive programs and ensure compliance with legal requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify staff vacancies and recruit, interview, and select applicants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate and report on industrial accidents for insurance carriers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze statistical data and reports to identify and determine causes of personnel problems and develop recommendations for improvement of organization's personnel policies and practices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer compensation, benefits, and performance management systems, and safety and recreation programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and follow budgets for personnel operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records and compile statistical reports concerning personnel-related data such as hires, transfers, performance appraisals, and absenteeism rates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide current and prospective employees with information about policies, job duties, working conditions, wages, opportunities for promotion, and employee benefits.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan, organize, direct, control, or coordinate the personnel, training, or labor relations activities of an organization.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct exit interviews to identify reasons for employee termination.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Oversee the evaluation, classification, and rating of occupations and job positions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze training needs to design employee development, language training, and health and safety programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Allocate human resources, ensuring appropriate matches between personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare personnel forecast to project employment needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study legislation, arbitration decisions, and collective bargaining contracts to assess industry trends.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop or administer special projects in areas such as pay equity, savings bond programs, day care, and employee awards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, administer, and evaluate applicant tests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Contract with vendors to provide employee services, such as food service, transportation, or relocation service.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide terminated employees with outplacement or relocation assistance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
